shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character crouched state to avoid flying obstacles
context.screen_position: Fixed x=100px, y=0 (ground level), reduced height profile
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player presses Down/Swipe Down to duck under pterodactyls

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur in horizontal crouched pose

animation.description: Ducking run cycle - Frame 1: left leg forward, Frame 2: right leg forward, same rhythm as player_run but crouched

visual_specification.details: Neck lowered horizontally, head close to ground, body elongated, tail extended, legs still running

relationships.shared_with: Same animation FPS as player_run (12 FPS) but different pose
relationships.differences_from: player_run is 88x94px vertical, player_duck is 118x60px horizontal; hitbox height reduced from 90px to 55px

explicit_negations: No transition animation between run and duck
No facial strain or effort indicators
No color changes during duck state
